name: Screenshot gallery and lightbox interaction
successCriteria: User can view screenshots in the gallery and open/close the lightbox overlay

steps.description: Navigate to a run with screenshots
Scroll down to screenshot gallery section
Click first screenshot thumbnail to open lightbox

reviewerNotes: Layer B: This journey exercises the only interactive client-side component. Microinteraction protocol is key — check hover states on thumbnails, transition quality when lightbox opens/closes, and whether the close affordance (X button) is discoverable. H3 (user control) — can the user easily dismiss the lightbox? Check ESC key support.
